user.description: Enter your REWE Market ID directly, or type your city / postal code to search for nearby REWE markets.

data.search_or_id: REWE Market ID or Search Query

select_market.description: Select your REWE market from the search results below.

invalid_certs.title: mTLS Certificates Missing or Invalid
invalid_certs.description:
The client certificates required to authenticate with the REWE API are missing or invalid.

Please place your 'client.pem' and 'client.key' in the 'custom_components/rewe/certs/' directory to proceed.

For instructions on how to extract these certificates from the REWE app, see the README at {readme_url}.

abort.already_configured: This REWE market is already configured.
abort.no_markets_found: No REWE markets found matching your query.

error.invalid_market_id: Please enter a valid numeric market ID.
error.search_failed: Failed to query the REWE market API. Please enter your ID manually.
error.missing_certificates: mTLS certificates are missing. Please enter your ID manually.
error.no_markets_found: No REWE markets found matching your query. Please try another search or enter ID manually.

connection_error.title: Error communicating with REWE API
connection_error.description: The integration is unable to fetch discounts. Please check the logs.

missing_certificates.title: Missing REWE mTLS certificates
missing_certificates.description: The client certificates required to authenticate with the REWE API are missing. Please reinstall the integration from HACS.
